title: Counterconditioning & Desensitization: Changing an Emotional Response
raw_text: Author Sarah Fraser (IAABC, APDT, Karen Pryor Academy certified, Fear Free Certified). CC/DS protocol: 1. Understand stress response - negative emotions trigger physiological changes. 2. Position dog 'at threshold' - noticing trigger with mild concern but able to disengage. 3. Pair trigger with high-value rewards to extinguish negative emotion at current intensity. 4. Gradually increase trigger intensity only after dog shows consistent calm. Classical conditioning principles, exposure therapy analogy. Short below-threshold sessions essential to prevent sensitization.

metadata.notes: IAABC/APDT/Karen Pryor Academy affiliated trainer, Fear Free Certified, multi-location facility
